ast.name: innerText
ast.source:
Segment for the plugin to detect the start of tasks. 
Supports Obsidian's comments syntax.
ast.target: 用于插件检测任务开始的片段。\n支持 Obsidian 的注释语法。

ast.name: innerText
ast.source:
Segment for the plugin to detect the end of tasks. 
Supports Obsidian's comments syntax.
ast.target: 用于插件检测任务结束的片段。\n支持 Obsidian 的注释语法。

ast.name: innerText
ast.target: Obsidian Markdown

ast.name: innerText
ast.source:
Set postfix for tasks. Popular usecases:
"💪" - Keep it up!
"✅{task_finish_date}" - to make it compatible with
ast.target: 为任务设置后缀。常见用例：\n\"💪\" - 继续加油！\n\"✅{task_finish_date}\" - 使其与

ast.name: innerText
ast.target: Obsidian Tasks 兼容

ast.name: innerText
ast.source:
Renders projects names as headers. 
If disabled, projects names will not be rendered at all.
ast.target: 将项目名称渲染为标题。\n如果禁用，项目名称将不会被渲染。

ast.name: innerText
ast.source:
You should disable this if you want to load more than 30 (up to 200) tasks. This is due to a limitation of the Todoist API.
If enabled, subtasks will be rendered as subtasks. 
If disabled, subtasks will be rendered as normal tasks.
Dramatically increases loading time if enabled.
ast.target:
如果您想加载超过 30 个（最多 200 个）任务，应禁用此选项。这是由于 Todoist API 的限制。
如果启用，子任务将被渲染为子任务。
如果禁用，子任务将被渲染为普通任务。
如果启用，会显著增加加载时间。
